name: Q7880928
abstract: Ulysses Livingston (January 29, 1912, Bristol, Tennessee - October 7, 1988, Los Angeles) was an American jazz guitarist and bass guitarist. Livingston's career in music began in the band of Horace Henderson as a roadie (or, as Henderson called them, "valet").

about_quotes.speaker: Trummy Young
about_quotes.evidence: So I rehearsed with them a few days, and the -- Ulysses Livingston was the guitar player... and we all went over there and -- together, about six or seven of us.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: So Trummy Young and Dexter and I, and Ulysses Livingston, and Arthur Dennis... we all go to Honolulu.
